title: Post-Install Hooks
description: Add support for custom shell scripts that run after tool installation, enabling shell configuration, environment setup, and project-specific initialization
acceptance_criteria: Per-tool hooks run after specific tool installs
Global hooks (pre_setup, post_setup) execute at correct times
Support for bash, zsh, sh, and powershell scripts
Environment variables passed to hooks (JARVY_TOOL, JARVY_VERSION, etc.)
Configurable timeout with default of 5 minutes
--dry-run shows what hooks would run without executing
Script output captured and displayed in real-time

tasks.title: Add HooksConfig to config parsing
tasks.description: Extend src/config.rs with HooksConfig, ToolHooks, and HookSettings structs
subtasks: Add HooksConfig struct with pre_setup, post_setup, tool_hooks, config fields
Add ToolHooks struct with post_install field
Add HookSettings struct with shell, timeout, continue_on_error fields
Update Config struct to include hooks field
Add serde deserialization for TOML hooks section
Write unit tests for config parsing

tasks.title: Create hooks module
tasks.description: Create src/hooks.rs with Hook struct and execution logic
subtasks: Create Hook struct with script and config fields
Implement HookConfig with shell, timeout, continue_on_error
Add HookError enum for error handling
Implement shell detection and command building
Add execute() method with timeout support
Handle stdout/stderr streaming

tasks.title: Add timeout support
tasks.description: Add wait_timeout crate and implement script timeouts
subtasks: Add wait_timeout dependency to Cargo.toml
Implement timeout wrapper for Command execution
Add timeout error variant to HookError
Test timeout behavior with long-running scripts

tasks.title: Integrate hooks into setup flow
tasks.description: Modify main setup flow to execute hooks at appropriate times
subtasks: Execute pre_setup hook before any tool installation
Execute per-tool post_install hooks after each tool installs
Execute post_setup hook after all tools are installed
Handle hook failures based on continue_on_error setting
Report hook execution results in final summary

tasks.title: Add CLI flags
tasks.description: Add --no-hooks and --dry-run CLI flags to setup command
subtasks: Add --no-hooks flag to skip all hook execution
Add --dry-run flag to show what would happen without executing
Update setup command to respect these flags
Add help text for new flags

tasks.title: Add environment variable injection
tasks.description: Pass environment variables to hook scripts
subtasks: Set JARVY_TOOL with current tool name
Set JARVY_VERSION with installed version
Set JARVY_OS with operating system
Set JARVY_ARCH with architecture
Set JARVY_HOME with config directory
Update PATH to include new tool locations

tasks.title: Write integration tests
tasks.description: Create comprehensive tests for hook execution
subtasks: Test pre_setup hook execution
Test post_setup hook execution
Test per-tool hooks
Test timeout behavior
Test continue_on_error behavior
Test --no-hooks flag
Test --dry-run output

tasks.title: Update documentation
subtasks: Add hooks section to configuration documentation
Create examples for common use cases
Document environment variables available to hooks
Document security considerations

implementation_notes.shell_detection: Use default shell from SHELL env var, fallback to /bin/sh on Unix
implementation_notes.windows_support: PowerShell execution requires different command building
implementation_notes.security: Warn users about running untrusted jarvy.toml files
implementation_notes.platform_hooks: Future enhancement: separate hooks per platform (post_install_windows)

risks.description: Arbitrary script execution poses security risks
risks.mitigation: Warn users about untrusted jarvy.toml files, add --confirm-hooks for CI
Support separate post_install_windows key for platform-specific scripts
